title: Implementation
doc_html:
§1217.17. Implementation

            The medical center shall implement the provisions of this Part to the extent that funds are appropriated by the legislature.

            Acts 1995, No. 951, §1; Acts 1997, No. 557, §1, eff. July 1, 1997; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1300.97 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
doc_text:
§1217.17.  Implementation
The medical center shall implement the provisions of this Part to the extent that funds
are appropriated by the legislature.
Acts 1995, No. 951, §1; Acts 1997, No. 557, §1, eff. July 1, 1997; Redesignated from
R.S. 40:1300.97 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
